i wanted to give extra info about wheels order not mattering in team builder. Wheels arrange themselves in hand in a fixed order according to their order in the collection.

When cards get mulliganned, they go to the bottom deck in order. the rightmost card mulliganned will be the bottom-most card in your deck.
 
Character sequence affects arrangement of their skills and this affects your bottom deck. Posse and wheel arrangements both follow collections order. 

even if it mattered, people don't usually discard wheels. maybe vs agrippa it makes sense to discard wheels.

Theoretically, you can potentially handread which wheels are in opponent's hand bc they have fixed arrangement.
